positive: A mystical geometric woodland scene print. Central composition featuring large, stylized, intertwined celestial flora and fauna elements—such as glowing stylized owls perched on crescent moon branches and meandering geometric vines. The aesthetic is Art Nouveau meets modern minimalism, rendered in strong silhouette contrasts. Use a limited, harmonious color palette: deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, muted gold, and stark black ink. The elements should be designed to pop on fabric, maintaining clean, crisp edges and high graphic contrast. The overall mood is serene, magical, and sophisticated.
